title: Hollow Knight Origins
description: Brings Hallownest's game mechanics into Minecraft via the Origins mod!
body:
**HOLLOW KNIGHT ORIGINS: THE KNIGHT**

This origin's development was commissioned by suspiciousdino75 on Discord, and it has been made public for the purposes of gathering playtest data and feedback. The objective here is to port the experience of playing as the Knight from the hit indie game Hollow Knight to Origins with slightly better results than it’s been done before and in a somewhat game-accurate manner, trying to preserve as many mechanics as possible as they are in the original game.

**Features:** For a full list of features and detailed information, check this document: [Everything you need to know to play this mod!](https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vQUu6T0FybdeQ6xN15PkOhL1oSGZ6ElbVb1vVypsVkJm9Tk03HJMXXFzlIUjYK7kdh7ySWa_mfdZXtm/pub)

![In-game items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52fd5692a2cde4e59e98733d243c7849c3e0bbdb.png)

**- Spells:**

-Focus
-Desolate Dive
-Vengeful Spirit

**- Item abilities:**

-Mantis Claws
-Monarch Wings
-Mothwing Cloak / Shade Cloak
-Crystal Heart

**- Items:**

-Old Nail and its upgrades
-Pale Ore
-Soul Vessels and their fragments
-Ancient Masks and their shards
-Charm Notches
-Charms (A number of them, at least)
-Geo

**NOTICE:** You can run this mod in Forge alongside Origins (Forge) by using Sinytra Connector and Forgify Fabric API. It should be functional enough to work, but it is possible that issues will arise from this.
